manifest.name: chalk-template
manifest.description: Terminal string styling with tagged template literals

scripts.test: xo && ava test/index.js && cross-env FORCE_COLOR=0 ava test/no-color.js && cross-env FORCE_COLOR=3 TERM=dumb ava test/full-color.js && cross-env FORCE_COLOR=3 TERM=dumb ava test/template.js && tsd
